headline: World Geography
description: Earth's surface: 71% water, 29% land. Seven continents: Asia (largest, 44.6M km²), Africa, North America, South America, Antarctica, Europe, Australia. Five oceans: Pacific (largest, 165M km²), Atlantic, Indian, Southern, Arctic. Highest point: Mt. Everest (8,848.86m). Deepest: Mariana Trench (10,994m).
